A01_broken_access_control.name: Broken Access Control
A01_broken_access_control.description: Restrictions on what authenticated users are allowed to do are not properly enforced.
A01_broken_access_control.impact: Unauthorized access to sensitive data, privilege escalation, account takeover

A02_cryptographic_failures.name: Cryptographic Failures
A02_cryptographic_failures.description: Failures related to cryptography which often lead to exposure of sensitive data.
A02_cryptographic_failures.impact: Data exposure, credential theft, compliance violations
prevention: Classify data processed, stored, or transmitted
Encrypt all sensitive data at rest

A03_injection.name: Injection
A03_injection.description: User-supplied data is not validated, filtered, or sanitized by the application.
A03_injection.impact: Data theft, data loss, authentication bypass, remote code execution

A04_insecure_design.name: Insecure Design
A04_insecure_design.description: Missing or ineffective control design in application architecture.
A04_insecure_design.impact: Business logic flaws, authentication bypasses, privilege escalation

A05_security_misconfiguration.name: Security Misconfiguration
A05_security_misconfiguration.description: Missing appropriate security hardening across any part of the application stack.

A06_vulnerable_components.name: Vulnerable and Outdated Components
A06_vulnerable_components.description: Components with known vulnerabilities used in the application.
A06_vulnerable_components.impact: Remote code execution, data breach, server compromise
prevention: Only use components from official sources

A07_identification_auth_failures.name: Identification and Authentication Failures
A07_identification_auth_failures.description: Weaknesses in authentication and session management.
A07_identification_auth_failures.impact: Account takeover, identity spoofing, privilege escalation
prevention: Do not ship with default credentials

A08_software_data_integrity_failures.name: Software and Data Integrity Failures
A08_software_data_integrity_failures.description: Code and infrastructure that does not protect against integrity violations.
A08_software_data_integrity_failures.impact: Supply chain compromise, code injection, system takeover
prevention: Ensure libraries come from trusted repositories

A09_security_logging_monitoring_failures.name: Security Logging and Monitoring Failures
A09_security_logging_monitoring_failures.description: Without logging and monitoring, breaches cannot be detected.
prevention: Set up alerting for suspicious activities

A10_server_side_request_forgery.name: Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF)
A10_server_side_request_forgery.description: SSRF flaws occur when a web application fetches a remote resource without validating the URL.
A10_server_side_request_forgery.impact: Internal network scanning, sensitive data access, cloud metadata theft
prevention: Deny by default: block internal IP ranges
Validate and sanitize all URL inputs

Content-Security-Policy.purpose: Prevent XSS and data injection attacks

critical.description: Exploitation can result in complete system compromise

high.description: Exploitation can result in significant data breach

medium.description: Exploitation can result in limited data access
